name: Parboiled White Coleslaw (Gebruehter Weisskrautsalat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage into quarters, remove the stem and tough outer leaves.
2. Grate the cabbage coarsely.
3. Add the grated cabbage to 4 quarts of boiling salted water and bring to a boil.
4. After 2 to 3 minutes, drain in a colander and shake dry.
5. Press out any remaining liquid.
6. Place the drained cabbage into a salad bowl.
7. Sprinkle with vinegar and mix well.
8. Allow to sit for several minutes.
9. Shortly before serving, cook the diced bacon until the fat has been rendered.
10. Pour the contents of the skillet (fat and bacon) over the salad.
11. Season to taste with salt, white pepper, and a little sugar.
12. Makes 4 cups.
Note: If using red cabbage, add 1 tbsp vinegar to the boiling water before adding the shredded cabbage to set the color. Some people prefer to substitute 1/3 cup salad oil for the bacon, which should be sprinkled cold over the still lukewarm cabbage.
